extract: Dewott (Japanese: フタチマル Futachimaru) is a Water-type Pokémon introduced in Generation V. It evolves from Oshawott starting at level 17 and evolves into Samurott starting at level 36. In Hisui, Dewott evolves from Oshawott starting at level 17 and evolves into Hisuian Samurott starting at level 36.
